---
title: "Data Analysis Project"
description: "An analytical project demonstrating SQL queries and Python data visualisation skills."
author: "Your Name"
date: "2025-04-01"
categories: [Python, SQL, Data Analysis]
---

## Overview

*[This project page will be populated with a full SQL and Python data analysis project, including interactive Plotly visualisations.]*

## Dataset

*[Description of the dataset used for analysis.]*

## SQL Analysis

*[SQL queries and their results will be presented here.]*

## Visualisations

*[Interactive Plotly charts will be embedded here.]*

## Key Findings

*[Summary of insights discovered through the analysis.]*
